race.name: Granfondo Novi Sad
race.tagline: UCI Gran Fondo World Series through Fruška Gora National Park

climate.description: Early June: typically 15-25°C (59-77°F), mild but variable

terrain.surface: Road cycling through Fruška Gora National Park: two major climbs, rolling ridge, descents, flat sprint finish
features: Road cycling through Fruška Gora National Park: two major climbs, rolling ridge, descents, flat sprint finish

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 77. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 76.

course_description.character: Circular route: neutral start via Rainbow Bridge along Danube to Beočin. **Suffering Zone 1**: 19km - 9km climb (4.5% avg, 8% max). Descent through Mala Remeta/Jazak to Vrdnik. **Suffering Zone 2**: 55km - 6km climb (3.8% avg, 7% max). 11km rolling Fruška Gora ridge (selective). Return descent. Medio splits at 62km. 2km flat sprint.

logistics.transport: Start/finish: Provincial Government building, Novi Sad city center. Nearest airport: Belgrade Nikola Tesla (BEG, ~90km). Organized by VABK.

history.origin_story: First UCI Gran Fondo World Series event in 2024. Second edition 2025, third on June 7-8, 2026. Novi Sad: 2022 European Capital of Culture.

biased_opinion.summary: Scenic UCI qualifier in wine country with perfect entry-level climbs and massive value. Fruška Gora's monasteries and vineyards make it unforgettable.

final_verdict.one_liner: UCI Gran Fondo World Series through Fruška Gora National Park

youtube_data.search_query: Granfondo Novi Sad gran fondo cycling Novi Sad

videos.title: Gran Fondo Novi Sad 2025
videos.description:
08.06.2025, full footage, no edit.
Enable subtitles to see speed/power/heart rate and other data for first 55minutes
(special thanks to  @SergeyRagozin  )

Road race 100km, 1500m elevation.
https://www.strava.com/activities/14732654480

00:00 Start and 20km flats.. Find your butt, dear participant! I bet I recorded almost everyone )
22:15 Beocin Kruzni put
27:50 the first big uphill 'Crveni Cot'
50:40 downhill from Crveni Cot
55:40 some false flat parts somewhere between uphills
56:45 downhill to Beocin, with 2 other guys
1:02:55 some 10k before finish, in a group of 3, 2 minutes behind leaders
1:06:05 last 500 meters, finish
videos.curation_reason: Most recent full race coverage with detailed course breakdown including specific climbs and elevation profile.

videos.title: Gran Fondo Novi Sad Serbia 2025 - shorter route 77km
videos.description:
A chronological mix of short clips from the Gran Fondo race in Novi Sad, Serbia, in June 2025.
This shorter route is actually called Medio Fondo and it is 77km long, starting and ending in Novi Sad, riding on the roads of the nearby mountain Fruska Gora

videos.title: Gran Fondo Novi Sad 2024 - The First 30 km of The Race
videos.description:
Gran Fondo Novi Sad, Serbia, 16.06.2024., this is the first 30 km from Novi Sad to Beocin, and the climb to Crveni Cot (539m). 


Chapters:

00:05 - Start
02:20 - Petrovaradin
10:00 - Sremska Kamenica
14:14 - Bocke
16:00 - Ledinci
19:20 - Rakovac
24:06 - Beocin
32:18 - Climb to Crveni Cot
01:01:03 - Short Break
01:02:36 - The Final Part of the Climb
